name: Task History & Persistence
description: Persists completed tasks to disk, loads history on startup, cleans up entries beyond retention period, and saves/restores the active task queue across app restarts.

Managers/HistoryManager.cs.content:
class HistoryManager
  L31: SaveHistory(ObservableCollection<AgentTask> historyTasks) -> void
  L76: LoadHistoryAsync(int retentionHours) -> Task<List<AgentTask>>
  L124: CleanupOldHistory(ObservableCollection<AgentTask> historyTasks, ConcurrentDictionary<string, TabItem> tabs, TabControl outputTabs, ConcurrentDictionary<string, System.Windows.Controls.RichTextBox> outputBoxes, int retentionHours) -> void
  L160: SaveActiveQueue(ObservableCollection<AgentTask> activeTasks, object activeTasksLock, bool useBackgroundWrite = false) -> void  // Persists active tasks that are in InitQueued, Queued, or Planning state so th...
  L247: LoadActiveQueueAsync() -> Task<List<AgentTask>>  // Loads tasks that were in the active queue when the app last shut down. Return...
  L301: ClearActiveQueue() -> void  // Removes the active queue file after tasks have been successfully recovered or...
  L311: SaveStoredTasks(ObservableCollection<AgentTask> storedTasks) -> void
  L343: LoadStoredTasksAsync() -> Task<List<AgentTask>>

Models/StoredTaskEntry.cs.content:
class StoredTaskEntry : TaskRecordBase
  FullOutput: string
  CreatedAt: DateTime

Models/TaskHistoryEntry.cs.content:
class TaskHistoryEntry : TaskRecordBase
  Status: string
  StartTime: DateTime
  EndTime: DateTime?
  IsFeatureMode: bool
  MaxIterations: int
  CurrentIteration: int
  CompletionSummary: string
  Recommendations: string
  GroupId: string?
  GroupName: string?
  InputTokens: long
  OutputTokens: long
  CacheReadTokens: long
  CacheCreationTokens: long
  WasActive: bool
  Model: string
  Headless: bool
  IgnoreFileLocks: bool
  UseMcp: bool
  SpawnTeam: bool
  ExtendedPlanning: bool
  PlanOnly: bool
  UseMessageBus: bool
  AutoDecompose: bool
  ApplyFix: bool
  AdditionalInstructions: string
  FullOutput: string
  DependencyContext: string?

patterns: Separate active-queue persistence for crash recovery
